patient_name.description: The first and last name of the caller. If not provided, output 'Unknown'.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the caller, formatted with the country code (e.g., +17605551234 or +526865551234). The system automatically captures the caller ID, but confirm it if they mention a different callback number.

procedure_interest.description: The primary dental procedure the patient is interested in.

language_spoken.description: The primary language the caller spoke during the call.

call_summary.description: A brief 2-3 sentence summary of the caller's needs, their timeline, and any specific questions they asked about pricing or border crossing.
